title: ReBorn - Recycled Washing Up Bowl - Kitchen Dish Wash & Drain - Large Carry Handles - Integrated Plug - Useful Pour Spout - 9 Litres Capacity - Made in Britain (Stone)
features: WASHING UP BOWL - Versatile washing up bowl with easy drain and strain, suitable for most sinks, with a generous 9 litre capacity
LARGE CARRY HANDLES - It has large carry handles for easy lifting, and legs to elevate the bowl for clean draining
INTEGRATED PLUG - It has an integrated plug for quick draining, that can also be set to strain water with food particles etc
POURING SPOUT - Thanks to a handy pour spout, you can easily decant water to other vessels or water your plants
SUSTAINABLE & STYLISH: Designed and made in the UK from 100% recycled materials, plus some colour and is repairable, reusable and ultimately recyclable at end of life
description: Product Description ✔ LARGE CARRY HANDLES The large carry handles mean it can be easily lifted. Legs elevate the bowl for clean draining. ✔ INTEGRATED DRAIN PLUG With an integrated plug for quick draining. The plug can also be set to strain water with food particles etc. ✔ USEFUL POURING SPOUT With a generous 9 litre capacity and a useful pouring spout to decant water to other vessels or watering plants.
